domains.note: Formal mathematics in Lean 4, re-checked by the Lean kernel at Gate A. The founding in-scope domain.

targets.note: Demo smoke-test suite (#5643) — retired now that PutnamBench (putnam-v1) is live. Goals are immutable (ADR-018) and stay benchmark-segregated, but the suite is excluded from the published registered-targets.json / guild page.
PutnamBench Lean 4 (Apache-2.0, 672 problems) — github.com/trishullab/PutnamBench (Tsoukalas et al.)
